title: Puffed Dutch Lamination-puff Fritters
description: Light and tangy Dutch fritters made with lamination-puff, perfect as a post-workout snack.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Gradually add the lamination-puff to the bowl and mix until the dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
When the oil is hot, add 2-3 fritters to the pan and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped parsley and chives.
